payload.title: Structured logging, health checks & alerting
payload.description: Add JSON structured logging (pino) to the Express hub, a /healthz endpoint, and wire platform-native logs/metrics (Fly/Render) plus a basic uptime alert. Note the Trebuchet observability skill does not apply (Swift-only). Lays groundwork for production tracing once multi-node (SCP-125). Depends on o1. (From SCP-126.)
